# filesystem-mcp
> **Complete guide to packaging and distributing MCP servers with MCPB** --- 📄 [MCPB_BUILDING_GUIDE.md](MCPB_BUILDING_GUIDE.md) **Complete 1,900+ line comprehensive guide** **What it covers**: - ✅ MCPB ...

This project includes automated llms.txt generation for AI accessibility.

## Docs
- [Readme](docs\mcpb-packaging\README.md): **Complete guide to packaging and distributing MCP servers with MCPB**

- [Readme](docs\github\README.md): > **Purpose**: Comprehensive GitHub configuration guide to avoid hours of trial-and-error setup.
- [Complete Setup Guide](docs\github\COMPLETE_SETUP_GUIDE.md): > **6 hours of pain distilled into 30 minutes of setup**
- [Debugging Lessons Learned](docs\DEBUGGING_LESSONS_LEARNED.md): **Real-World Experience Report**
- [Three Filesystem Mcp Comparison](THREE_FILESYSTEM_MCP_COMPARISON.md): | Server | Framework | Focus | Total Tools | Platform |
- [Repository Analysis 2025 10 26](docs\repository-analysis-2025-10-26.md): **Date:** 2025-10-26_00-38-06
- [Mcp Production Checklist](docs\MCP_PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md): Use this checklist to audit any MCP server repo before marking it production-ready.
- [Release Checklist](docs\github\RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md): > **Don't ship broken code!** - Complete pre-release validation from our beta release experience.

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python project configuration and dependencies
- [Package](webapp\package.json): Node.js project configuration and dependencies
- [Cargo](Cargo.toml): Rust project configuration and dependencies
- [Config](.git\config): Application configuration files
